message:
test(perf): case-insensitive debug profile exclusion in binary size candidate builder

Add binary_size_candidate_builder_ignores_debug_profile_case_insensitive()
verifying that build_binary_size_candidate_paths() filters debug profiles
regardless of casing (e.g. "DeBuG" still excluded from candidates).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
